training_status: athletic, active in gym and backcountry skiing

benefits.description: Using Reta to trim up stubborn love handles

side_effects.description: Decrease in athletic performance; cardio markedly worse, elevated heart rate during uphill efforts (145 bpm vs previous 135 bpm)

protocol_notes: User is considering combining Retatrutide with IGF-1 LR3 for synergistic effect while maintaining/gaining muscle during weight loss phase. Concerned about blood sugar and insulin resistance interactions.
